faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our services, products, and processes
faq.noResults: No questions found in this category.

cta.title: Still have questions?
cta.description: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Please chat with our friendly team.

faq-1.question: What services does Innovayse offer?
faq-1.answer: We offer full-cycle digital services including web & mobile development, SEO (technical, content, local, e-commerce, international), PPC advertising (Google Ads, Yandex Direct), and ready-to-use SaaS products.

faq-2.question: How long does a typical project take?
faq-2.answer: Project timelines vary based on scope and complexity. A simple website takes 4-6 weeks, while complex web applications can take 3-6 months. We provide detailed timelines during the estimation phase.

faq-3.question: Do you work with international clients?
faq-3.answer: Yes! We work with clients worldwide and have experience with projects in North America, Europe, and Asia. Our team is fluent in English and Russian.

faq-4.question: What is your pricing model?
faq-4.answer: We offer flexible pricing: fixed-price for well-defined projects, time & materials for evolving requirements, and monthly retainers for ongoing support. Contact us for a custom quote.

faq-5.question: Do you provide post-launch support?
faq-5.answer: Absolutely! We offer various support packages including bug fixes, updates, hosting management, and feature enhancements. All projects include 30 days of free post-launch support.

faq-6.question: What technologies do you use?
faq-6.answer: We use modern tech stacks including React, Vue, Next.js, Nuxt, Node.js, Python, Laravel, and cloud platforms like AWS and Vercel. We choose technologies based on project requirements.

faq-7.question: Can you integrate with existing systems?
faq-7.answer: Yes! We have extensive experience integrating with CRMs, ERPs, payment gateways, APIs, and legacy systems. We ensure seamless data flow between platforms.

faq-8.question: Do you build mobile apps?
faq-8.answer: Yes, we develop native iOS/Android apps as well as cross-platform solutions using React Native and Flutter. We help you choose the best approach for your needs.

faq-9.question: Will I own the source code?
faq-9.answer: Yes, you receive full ownership of all source code and assets upon project completion and final payment. We can also provide documentation and training.

faq-10.question: How long does SEO take to show results?
faq-10.answer: SEO is a long-term strategy. You can expect to see initial improvements in 3-4 months, with significant results in 6-12 months. Timeline depends on competition and current site state.

faq-11.question: Do you guarantee first page rankings?
faq-11.answer: We cannot guarantee specific rankings as search algorithms constantly change. However, we follow proven strategies and typically achieve first-page rankings for target keywords.

faq-12.question: What is included in your SEO service?
faq-12.answer: Our SEO includes technical audits, keyword research, on-page optimization, content strategy, link building, Core Web Vitals optimization, and monthly reporting with actionable insights.

faq-13.question: Do you handle international SEO?
faq-13.answer: Yes! We have experience with multi-language and multi-region SEO, including hreflang implementation, local search optimization, and international link building strategies.

faq-14.question: Can I customize your SaaS products?
faq-14.answer: Yes! All our products offer customization options. Basic plans include theme customization, while Enterprise plans include custom features, integrations, and white-label options.

faq-15.question: Do you offer free trials?
faq-15.answer: Yes, all our SaaS products offer 14-day free trials with no credit card required. You get full access to features during the trial period.
